payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark brown wooden picture frame with carved/grooved molding and a narrow gilded inner trim; shows the bottom-right corner of a wall-mounted nautical painting (sailboats, muted tones). Frame has a glossy finish with minor wear at the corner; canvas texture and painted water visible. Appears close to camera — approximately 0.5 m away.
